case_title: MARK J. LINARES VS. JOEHLEEN ARCHARD ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-26-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT JOEHLEEN ARCHARD. PLAINTIFF MARK LINARES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICK GAVIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOEHLEEN ARCHARD IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,763.00 FILED BY LINARES, MARK J. AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHARD, JOEHLEEN GAVIN, PATRICK C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-10-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REACHED AN AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APR-10-18 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. AT PLAINTIFFS REQUEST DEFENDANT JOEHLEEN ARCHARD IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE; PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS DEFECTIVE. PLAINTIFF MARK LINARES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PATRICK GAVIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOEHLEEN ARCHARD IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES FROM PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. THIS MATTER WAS REQUESTED BY PARTIES TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 04/10/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $120.00 SERVED JUL-05-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GAVIN, PATRICK C.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $60.00) SERVED AUG-22-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHARD, JOEHLEEN
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/1/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINARES, MARK J. AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHARD, JOEHLEEN

REMARK: COPY OF ENDORSED FILED PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AND PICTURE OF DOOR WITH ENVELOPE ON THE DOOR WAS BROUGHT TO SMALL CLAIMS WINDOW, BY PERSON WHO STATES THAT SHE IS NOT THE PARTY/DEFENDANT (ARCHARD) NAMED IN PLAINTIFFS CLAIM, BUT THE ARE THE HOMOWNER LIVING AT 387 PONDEROSA. CADL SHOWN NAME ON THE DL DOES NOT MATCH THE DEFENDANT (ARCHARD).
